text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has won against T.M. Opera O in
the Satsuki Sho, spring Tenno Sho, and four other
G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But something is off. She's won way too many
times. Could this all be a dream where she's
switched places with the Overlord?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fervent praise she's receiving from everyone
only further strengthens her suspicions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this is not a dream. Her talents have certified
her as a piece of living history.
